brand.name: Voices Bringing Hope to Life
brand.tagline: Because every life deserves a voice

hero.title: You are not alone. Hope and help are here.
hero.description: We provide calm, honest guidance and practical support for women facing unexpected pregnancies.
hero.trustLine: Informational support only. In immediate danger, call 911.

mission.title: A safe place for truth, dignity, and support
mission.body: Our mission is to support women with compassion first, then provide clear information, reliable resources, and a life-affirming path forward.

paths.title: Explore your paths without pressure
paths.description: Every story is different. Start with the path that matches your situation.

parenting.title: Parenting
parenting.body: Understand daily realities, available programs, and support networks for raising a child.

adoption.title: Adoption
adoption.body: Learn about adoption options and licensed professional resources in clear, respectful language.

options.title: Understanding your options
options.body: Review educational content that separates biological facts, ethical perspectives, and faith beliefs.

resources.title: Start with practical support
resources.description: Find trustworthy services that can help right now.

localHelp.title: Find local help
localHelp.body: Locate nearby pregnancy centers, community support, and practical assistance.

hotlines.title: Crisis and hotline support
hotlines.body: Reach trusted hotline partners for urgent emotional, safety, and pregnancy support.

support.title: Emotional support
support.body: Access mental health and healing-focused resources for difficult moments.

faq.title: Common questions
faq.description: Quick answers for moments when you need clarity fast.

items.q3: Where can I get immediate support?

finalCta.title: We are here whenever you are ready
finalCta.body: You deserve support, clear information, and a safe next step.

footer.missionText: We are a non-commercial informational organization dedicated to compassionate support, truth, and hope for every life.
footer.helpText: If you are in immediate danger, call 911. For crisis support, call 988.
footer.disclaimer: This website provides informational and support content only. It does not provide medical, legal, mental health, or emergency services.
footer.copyright: Copyright {{year}} Voices Bringing Hope to Life

about.title: About Our Mission | Voices Bringing Hope to Life
about.description: Learn about our mission, vision, values, and trust-centered approach to supporting women with compassion and clarity.

options.title: Understanding Your Options | Voices Bringing Hope to Life
options.description: Explore your options with compassionate guidance, clear distinctions, and practical support links for your next step.

resources.title: Local Resources by Country | Voices Bringing Hope to Life
resources.description: Select your country and browse practical support resources including phone, web, and local help centers.

stories.title: Stories of Hope by Country | Voices Bringing Hope to Life
stories.description: Select a country and browse stories in gallery format with each story title and author.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions | Voices Bringing Hope to Life
faq.description: Search and filter common questions to quickly find practical, compassionate guidance and your next safe step.

contact.title: Contact Support Team | Voices Bringing Hope to Life
contact.description: Send a message to our support team for compassionate guidance, practical resources, and trusted next steps.

hero.title: Compassion first. Clarity always.
hero.description: Voices Bringing Hope to Life exists to walk with women in vulnerable moments with truth, tenderness, and practical next steps.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.body: We provide compassionate, life-affirming guidance that protects dignity and helps women make informed decisions with confidence.

vision.title: Our vision
vision.body: We envision communities where no woman feels abandoned in crisis and every family can access trustworthy care, resources, and hope.

values.title: The values that shape every conversation
values.description: These principles guide how we listen, communicate, and serve every person who reaches out.

dignity.title: Dignity
dignity.body: Every woman and every child carries immeasurable worth.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.body: We provide honest information without pressure or manipulation.

compassion.title: Compassion
compassion.body: We respond with empathy, patience, and practical care.

confidentiality.title: Confidentiality
confidentiality.body: We treat sensitive stories with respect and privacy.

story.title: Why this work exists
story.bodyOne: Many women facing unexpected pregnancy feel isolated, rushed, or unheard. We were created to offer a calmer and safer alternative.
story.bodyTwo: Our team connects women to practical help, reliable education, and caring support so each next step can be taken with courage.

trust.title: How we build trust
trust.description: Trust is earned through consistency, transparency, and care in every interaction.

confidentialCare.title: Confidential support
confidentialCare.body: Conversations are handled with discretion and respect for personal boundaries.

practicalResources.title: Practical resources
practicalResources.body: We connect women with hotlines, local services, and real-world assistance.

transparentInformation.title: Transparent information
transparentInformation.body: We distinguish facts, values, and beliefs clearly so decisions can stay informed.

closing.title: You deserve a calm and caring next step
closing.body: Wherever you are in your journey, we are ready to support you with compassion and clear guidance.

hero.title: You deserve clear information and compassionate support.
hero.description: This page is designed to help you process each path with dignity, honesty, and care, without pressure.

orientation.title: You are not alone in this moment
orientation.bodyOne: Fear, uncertainty, and emotional overload are common in unexpected pregnancy. You are not weak for feeling overwhelmed.
orientation.bodyTwo: Our role is to offer calm orientation, practical resources, and trustworthy information so you can make informed decisions.

pathways.title: Explore each path with respect
pathways.description: Every situation is unique. Review each path with clarity in {{country}}, then choose the next step that fits your reality.

continuingPregnancy.title: Continuing your pregnancy
continuingPregnancy.body: Learn what support systems, planning steps, and care resources can help during pregnancy.

parenting.title: Parenting
parenting.body: Explore practical help for housing, finances, childcare, and family support for parenting decisions.

adoption.title: Adoption
adoption.body: Understand open, closed, and semi-open adoption pathways and how licensed agencies support them.

understandingAbortion.title: Understanding abortion
understandingAbortion.body: Review medical context, emotional reports, and ethical perspectives with careful and respectful framing.

framework.title: How we present information
framework.description: To protect trust and reduce confusion, we separate these categories clearly throughout our educational content.

biologicalFacts.title: Biological facts
biologicalFacts.body: Scientific and medical descriptions are presented as factual context from credible sources.

ethicalPerspective.title: Ethical perspective
ethicalPerspective.body: Moral arguments are identified as ethical reasoning, not as medical conclusions.

faithBeliefs.title: Faith-based beliefs
faithBeliefs.body: Spiritual viewpoints are labeled as belief-based perspectives rooted in faith traditions.

commitments.title: Our safety and respect commitments
commitments.description: We aim to be a safe, non-coercive, and transparent place for women processing difficult decisions.

items.nonJudgment: You will be treated with compassion, dignity, and respect, never shame.
items.confidentiality: Sensitive stories are handled with privacy and discretion.
items.medicalNotice: This content is educational only and does not replace care from a licensed healthcare professional.

closing.title: If you need immediate support, we are ready
closing.body: You can take one calm step today. Help is available, and you do not have to navigate this alone.

hero.title: Find support resources by country
hero.description: Choose your country to view trusted support contacts and practical next-step resources.

selector.label: Select country
selector.helper: The list defaults to your likely region based on browser locale settings.

gallery.title: Resources in {{country}}
gallery.description: Each row includes a support resource with details, type, and quick access action.

resourcesPage.empty: No resources are available for this country yet.

closing.title: Need immediate help right now?
closing.body: If your situation feels urgent, go directly to emergency and hotline resources.

hero.title: Read stories from women and families
hero.description: Choose a country to browse stories that reflect courage, support, and next-step healing.

selector.label: Select country
selector.helper: Stories are filtered by country, defaulting to your likely region.

gallery.title: Stories in {{country}}
gallery.description: Gallery view with image, story title, and author name.

storiesPage.empty: No stories are available for this country yet.

submit.title: Share your story in a safe, guided way
submit.description: Your story can encourage another woman. Every submission is reviewed before publication.

status.success: Thank you for sharing your story. Our editorial team will review it with care before publication.
status.error: We could not submit your story right now. Please try again in a moment.

publicationPreference.label: How should we display your name?

allowFollowUp.label: I allow the team to contact me for clarifications if needed.

consentAccepted.label: I confirm this story is mine, submitted voluntarily, and can be published in whole or edited form according to site guidelines.

errors.title: Please provide a title with at least 6 characters.
errors.authorName: Please provide a name or pseudonym (at least 2 characters).
errors.email: Please provide a valid email address.
errors.storyBody: Please write at least 120 characters so we can understand your story context.
errors.consentAccepted: You must accept consent terms before submitting.

form.disclaimer: Personal stories are individual experiences, not medical, legal, or psychological advice. We may edit identifying details to protect privacy and may decline submissions that do not meet safety or editorial standards.

preview.titleFallback: Your story title will appear here
preview.bodyFallback: As you write, this card previews how your story may appear after editorial review and privacy edits.

hero.title: Find answers fast with guided questions
hero.description: Use smart filters, pick a question card, and get a focused answer panel with next-step actions.

search.label: Search questions
search.placeholder: Type privacy, hotline, adoption, support, or safety

questionRail.title: Question stream
questionRail.description: Select any card to load a focused answer on the right.

answer.note: Informational guidance only. In immediate danger, contact local emergency services right away.

empty.title: No questions matched your search
empty.description: Try another keyword or clear filters to view the full question stream.

immediateSupport.question: Where can I get immediate support right now?
immediateSupport.answer: If your situation feels urgent, go directly to crisis support and hotline resources for immediate assistance and local emergency guidance.
immediateSupport.keywords: urgent hotline emergency immediate danger safety

medicalProvider.question: Are you a licensed medical provider?
medicalProvider.answer: We provide informational and support guidance. We do not replace diagnosis, treatment, or care from a licensed medical professional.
medicalProvider.keywords: medical provider licensed clinical diagnosis treatment

privacyConfidentiality.question: Is my information private and confidential?
privacyConfidentiality.answer: We treat personal stories with discretion and care. Share only what you are comfortable sharing, and ask us about privacy expectations.
privacyConfidentiality.keywords: privacy confidential data personal information anonymous

localHelp.question: How do I find help centers near me?
localHelp.answer: Open the resources page to browse country-aware directories, support centers, and trustworthy organizations with practical contact details.
localHelp.keywords: local help center directory nearby resources map

financialSupport.question: Can I find financial or material support?
financialSupport.answer: Many support programs include food, housing referrals, baby items, transportation support, and counseling about practical next steps.
financialSupport.keywords: financial support housing food transportation baby supplies

adoptionBasics.question: Where do I start if I want to explore adoption?
adoptionBasics.answer: Start with the options section to review adoption pathways, legal context, and questions to ask when evaluating licensed professionals.
adoptionBasics.keywords: adoption process legal agency placement options

parentingSupport.question: What support exists if I choose parenting?
parentingSupport.answer: You can access community referrals, practical planning help, and emotional support networks designed for women and families.
parentingSupport.keywords: parenting support family planning community referrals

emotionalSupport.question: How can I get emotional support without pressure?
emotionalSupport.answer: You can connect with supportive listeners and counseling resources that prioritize dignity, calm guidance, and non-coercive care.
emotionalSupport.keywords: emotional support counseling pressure free compassionate

partnerConversation.question: How can I talk with my partner or family about this?
partnerConversation.answer: Start with clear boundaries, identify trusted people, and use structured conversation prompts to communicate your needs safely.
partnerConversation.keywords: partner family conversation boundaries trusted people

afterAbortionCare.question: Is there support if I am processing a past abortion?
afterAbortionCare.answer: Yes. Healing support can include counseling, spiritual accompaniment, and community groups focused on recovery and compassion.
afterAbortionCare.keywords: after abortion healing recovery grief counseling

hero.title: We are here. Reach out anytime.
hero.description: Share your situation and our support team will respond with care, clarity, and practical next steps.

form.title: Send us a message
form.description: This form helps us route your request to the right team while preserving a compassionate experience.

errors.name: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters).
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.message: Please include at least 20 characters in your message.

form.disclaimer: Contacting us through this form does not create a professional, medical, legal, or therapeutic relationship. Do not use this form for medical emergencies or immediate crisis situations. If you need urgent help, call 988 or 911.

status.success: Your message was sent successfully. We aim to reply within 1-2 business days.
status.error: We could not send your message right now. Please try again in a moment.

support.title: Other ways to connect
support.description: Use these channels if you need a different way to reach our team.
support.regionValue: North America and international digital support
support.storyConsent: By submitting your story, you grant Voices Bringing Hope to Life permission to publish it on this website in whole or edited form, with your name or anonymously.
